sentence_structures: Opens with a 1–2 word exclamatory hook before expanding the thought
Uses 'right' as a trailing confirmation marker at the end of statements
Thoughts loop back and self-correct mid-sentence before landing
Runs thoughts together with repeated 'and' conjunctions — breathless forward rhythm
Uses parenthetical asides to add colour without breaking the main thought
Ends on a flat declarative that lands softly rather than wrapping up cleanly
Builds rhythm through triplet phrasing and repetition to land emotional points
energy_pattern: escalates descriptively mid-sentence then collapses into incompletion or a resigned summary
